name: Impossible Pizza Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 425°F.
2. Grease a pie plate that is 10 x 1 1/2 inches in size.
3. Sprinkle 2/3 cup chopped onion and 1/3 cup grated Parmesan cheese into the pie plate.
4. In a blender, beat together 1/4 cup milk, 3 eggs, and 3/4 cup Bisquick for 15 seconds on high until smooth.
5. Pour the batter mixture into the prepared pie plate.
6. Bake at 425°F for 20 minutes.
7. Spread the pizza sauce evenly over the top of the baked crust.
8. Arrange the remaining ingredients (remaining pepperoni slices, green peppers, and additional cheese) on top of the pizza sauce.
9. Bake for an additional 15-20 minutes or until the cheese is lightly browned.
10. Allow to cool for 5 minutes before serving.
For half recipe:
Use a 1-quart square or round casserole dish. Reduce Parmesan to 2 tablespoons, eggs to 2, and Bisquick to 1/2 cup. Divide remaining ingredient amounts in half. Shorten the blending time to 10 seconds and baking time to 10-15 minutes for optimal results at high altitudes.
